title: limonium gougetianum
intro: Limonium gougetianum, also known as the Gouget's sea lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Limonium gougetianum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as providing relief from coughs and colds. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it can also be dried for use in herbal remedies and potpourri.
